meta.note: Public-records parcel-possibilities dossiers, keyed by Catastro cadastral reference (RC). Every display row carries a `confidence`: verified | medium | weak | pending. Private / scheme / deck intel is intentionally EXCLUDED — this is the objective public baseline (see VISION.md: the public-dossier layer). `signals` drive computeVerdict(); the row arrays are for display only.

identity.classification: Suelo urbanizable · Sector 1B · NNSS-97 · no PGOU

canIBuild.label: Land class
canIBuild.note: Residential sector, 78-dwelling envelope (NNSS-97 inventory). Catastro descriptor «PL SECTOR 1 B 1».

canIBuild.label: Instrument
canIBuild.note: UE-1B urbanization project reportedly approved 3 Aug 2023 — confirm it covers this RC.

canIBuild.label: PRCAM overlay
canIBuild.note: Sectors abutting the park cede an ecological-corridor buffer (verified from the Sector 10C plan parcial). Parcel zone A/B/P still to confirm.

canIBuild.label: Red Natura 2000
canIBuild.note: The exact trigger that reclassified part of Sector 7C. Live WFS check queued.

canIBuild.label: Vías pecuarias · DPH
canIBuild.note: Cattle-trail & watercourse setbacks → no-build exclusions for the engine.

howMuch.label: Edificabilidad
howMuch.note: The buildable coefficient (m²/m²) is set in the sector ficha; not yet in public reach. It unlocks the whole feasibility.

howMuch.label: Dwelling cap
howMuch.note: Maximum residential units the sector is dimensioned for (NNSS-97 inventory).

howMuch.label: Height culture
howMuch.note: Town-wide massing verified from the Sector 10C ordinance; applies to any building in the sector.

howMuch.label: Cession
howMuch.note: Ceded to the ayuntamiento (Ley 9/2001), confirmed against a live El Boalo ficha. Plus redes locales + VPP reserve.

rows.label: Permitted uses
rows.note: Residential is implied by the 78-dwelling sector. Whether terciario / hotelero is also permitted is the decisive line, still in the ficha.

rows.label: Residential capacity
rows.note: The maximum the sector is dimensioned for (NNSS-97), before cessions and the buildable coefficient.

rows.label: Development path
rows.note: Urbanizable land is not buildable until a plan parcial is approved and executed via sistema de compensación (single owner ⇒ convenio de gestión).

rows.label: Advancement
rows.note: A related unit reached proyecto de urbanización (BOCM) — signals the sector may be advancing, not declassifying. Confirm the scope covers this RC.

whatPermitted.callout: The permitted-use line is decisive. A residential sector cap does not by itself grant terciario / hotelero use — any hospitality or commercial program depends on the ficha's uses table or a modificación. Residential capacity up to the dwelling cap is the safe public baseline.

stats.s: No public transaction for this RC

rows.label: Area demand
rows.note: Corridor: new-build €3,200–3,580/m², resale €2,060–2,680/m², +8–19% YoY (public listings / registry).

rows.label: Hospitality benchmark
rows.note: Zero sierra hotel transactions 2020–26; the one comparable sierra hotel (Rascafría) closed 11+ yrs, tender drew no bids; boutique ADR €121–188 (public sources).

rows.label: Value driver
rows.note: Urbanizable value hinges on the coefficient (§02) and reclassification risk; rústic dehesa in the region trades far lower per m².

1683501VL2018S.sources: NNSS-97 El Boalo-Cerceda-Mataelpino · Plan Parcial Sector 10C, Normas Urbanísticas (comunidad.madrid, ene 2022) · Catastro INSPIRE · SIU land classification · Ley 9/2001 del Suelo CM · Ley 1/1985 PRCAM · public area listings (idealista) · INE renta · Inside Airbnb / OSM. Full trace in docs/boalo-planning-research.md.
